quicker-ui.title: Open Quicker UI
quicker-ui.description: Open Quicker settings pages and windows (recycle bin, general settings, search box, process scene). Use when the user asks to open a Quicker UI page/window.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Headless action editing overview: doc layers, P0–P7 index, topic routing. Use when starting action editing or choosing which guide to read.

authoring-workflow.title: Action authoring workflow
authoring-workflow.description: P1–P7 main action editing flow. Use before the first action edit in a session.
authoring-workflow.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_create qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit

workspace-editing.title: Workspace editing
workspace-editing.description: .quicker/actions layout; workspace_action_*_data and workspace_action_file_*; patch saves. Use when editing on disk.
workspace-editing.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit
workspace-editing.compatibility: QuickerAgent; requires working directory in sidebar

action-data-schema.title: Action data.json schema
action-data-schema.description: Use when authoring data.json: qkrpc.program-data.v1 JSON schema + steps[]/variables[] wire rules (bind, branching, defaults). guide get --json returns schema.
action-data-schema.allowed-tools: qkrpc_guide_get qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search qkrpc_action_create workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit qkrpc_action_patch

action-icons.title: Action icons
action-icons.description: Font Awesome fa: spec and http(s) image URLs for metadata and context menus. Use before set-metadata or guessing fa:Light_* names.

patch-workflow.title: Patch workflow (CLI)
patch-workflow.description: CLI inline action patch JSON (qkrpc action patch --patch-file).

step-runner-search.title: Step-runner search
step-runner-search.description: Catalog search syntax (OR, wildcards, sys:*). Use when finding step module key before step_runner_get.

step-runner-get.title: Step-runner schema (get)
step-runner-get.description: Agent/CLI step-runner get: compressed schema vs search; forbid get-ui. Use after search, before writing inputParams.

implementation-fallback.title: Implementation fallback
implementation-fallback.description: P4 fallback: expressions/evalexpression first, then sys:csscript vs runScript. Use when no dedicated module fits.

expressions.title: Expressions & interpolation
expressions.description: P4 default: $=, $$, sys:evalexpression (LINQ/string/JSON/multi-assign). Prefer before sys:csscript.

subprogram-workflow.title: Subprograms
subprogram-workflow.description: Global vs embedded subprograms and call workflow. Use when adding subprogram steps or editing subprogram projects.

action-organization-workflow.title: Action organization
action-organization-workflow.description: Use when tidying action pages: list/search (uses: refs), move, global tab create/reorder, virtual process ensure — not for editing steps.
action-organization-workflow.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_move qkrpc_profile_create qkrpc_profile_reorder qkrpc_process_ensure

action-project-files.title: Workspace project layout
action-project-files.description: .quicker/actions/{actionId} tree, data.json, files/ external {file} refs. Use when authoring file refs on disk.

action-embedded-subprograms.title: Embedded subprograms
action-embedded-subprograms.description: subprograms/{subId}/ disk model; root data.json without inline subPrograms[]. Use when editing embedded subprograms.

form-spec.title: Form spec
form-spec.description: Use when authoring sys:form: formDef.file + files/*.form.json (qkrpc.form.v1). guide get --json returns qkrpc.form-spec.v1 schema.
form-spec.allowed-tools: qkrpc_guide_get qkrpc_form_validate qkrpc_form_build qkrpc_step_runner_get workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_write qkrpc_action_patch

webview2-authoring.title: WebView2 authoring
webview2-authoring.description: sys:webview2: external files/*.html, virtualHostToFolder; agent browser preview. Use before patch.
webview2-authoring.allowed-tools: qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit workspace_action_patch browser qkrpc_action debug

common-operation-item.title: Context menu item syntax
common-operation-item.description: CommonOperationItem multi-line text: ContextMenuData, [icon]title(hint)|data, submenus, quicker_in_param. Use when editing context menus.
common-operation-item.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_fa_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_edit_data

step-modules.title: Step modules reference
step-modules.description: Condensed step module catalog by category. Use after step-runner search, with step_runner_get; docs_get_reference topic step-modules.
